pi_items.source: Task description implicitly requires navigating the outliner, interacting with the IFC hierarchy, and selecting an element.
Task description and operations heavily depend on manipulating BIM spatial structure via Blender's outliner for an IFC file.
Tasks related to BIM structure navigation and IFC model review are central to the role of an architect or BIM coordinator.
BIM and IFC models are foundational standards in the Architecture, Engineering, and Construction (AEC) industry.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the AC20-FZK-Haus.ifc model downloaded directly from ifcwiki.org, which is a real architectural sample file. The downloaded IFC model has been verified to contain the requested spatial structure entities, including 'Erdgeschoss' and 'Dachgeschoss' IFCBUILDINGSTOREY elements.
